name: evidence_bag
description: Reversible evidence store. Full text preserved, query-driven assembly. Supplement for STM — NOT a replacement.
warning: The bag surfaces what is relevant but not how it connects in sequence. STM provides the causal thread. Use both together.

ingest_turn.description: Ingest one conversation turn into the bag

window.description: Query the bag and return a token-budget-constrained evidence slice
window.returns: { query, goal, bag_id, text, summary, selected_nodes, evidence_spans }

reconstruct.description: Reconstruct full text from a saved bag by ID or file path

params.bag_file: string — optional path to bag JSON file

inspect.description: Return a structural tree + item manifest of everything currently in the bag
inspect.returns: { goal, tree: [DocumentEntry], stats } — see focus() to drill into a node

focus.description: Return the full content of a specific node and its immediate neighbors

set_goal.description: Set the active goal that biases all subsequent window() queries

usage_pattern: 1. Inspect the bag first: inspect() → see what documents are stored
2. Focus on a specific document or claim: focus(node_id) → read full content
3. Query for relevant context: window(query, token_budget) → get scored evidence slice
4. Combine with STM: bag provides old/overflow evidence; STM provides recent causal thread
